title: Ubiquiti nanoHD RetroFit Mount kit, 3-pack
description: NanoHD-RetroFit-3 is a mounting kit for attaching the UAP-nanoHD unit to the wall or ceiling with the original UAP, UAP-LR mounts. Once mounted, your UAP-nanoHD, U6 Lite or U6+ will blend in with the walls because the Retrofit Mount kit eliminates the lateral taper of the transmitter units to zero
